title: Evaluation of Skills Bootcamps: completions and outcomes
body: "This document builds on the implementation report for wave 3 Skills Bootcamps and:   provides detail about differences in completions and outcomes across learner groups gives a more detailed picture of performance and further demographic breakdowns of the programme’s impact compares findings to wave 2 to show change over time   The report includes research from 2 surveys. The completion survey explored participants’:   self-reported change to employment perceptions of delivery overall satisfaction with their training   The comparison survey explored what training applicants had undertaken in the absence of a Skills Bootcamp and the associated outcomes and impacts. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
